items.title: How can I track improvement?
items.description: The SmartPath Dashboard provides a complete view of learner engagement and progress across your learning journeys.

items.title: How Learners Can Mark Attendance for SmartPath - Learning session on Their Own?
items.description: Learners can self-mark their attendance for learning sessions in SmartPath directly from the User View using the built-in scanner option.

items.title: How to add Learning Sessions In SmartPath Module?
items.description: Your SmartPaths can be enhanced with Learning Sessions to provide scheduled instructor-led or facilitated activities as part of the learning journey.

items.title: How to Add/Remove segments in Module added to SmartPath?
items.description: You can add or remove any segments from module as per the requirement.

items.title: How to archive a SmartPath and unhide them in future if needed?
items.description: SmartWinnr allows you to archive SmartPaths that are no longer required, while still providing the option to unarchive them in the future if needed.

items.title: How to create a module for SmartPath.
items.description: To build a structured learning experience within a SmartPath, you first need to create the modules that will be included in it.

items.title: How to create a SmartPath?
items.description: A SmartPath is a structured sequence of learning modules designed to guide learners step by step through a curated learning journey.

items.title: How to create an action item in the SmartPath
items.description: Action items are tasks or checklists that learners must complete as part of the learning journey.

items.title: How to create Assignment in SmartPath?
items.description: Assignments help evaluate learner understanding by requiring them to complete specific tasks, submit responses, or upload supporting files as part of the…

items.title: How to Create SmartPath with Learning Sessions?
items.description: In the similar way, we add modules with Quizzes, surveys, SmartFeeds, video coaching, etc to a SmartPath, we can also add modules with learning sessions…

items.title: How to download SmartPath Reports?
items.description: SmartPath reports provide deep insights into learner participation, progress, performance, and feedback across a SmartPath.

items.title: How to edit a SmartPath.
items.description: You can edit an existing SmartPath at any time to update its details or modify its content.

items.title: How to evaluate the Assignment submitted in SmartPath?
items.description: Editor can effectively monitor the assignment submission and supports timely reviews, which ensures accurate tracking of learner progress and performance.

items.title: How to Import SCORM course into SmartWinnr?
items.description: SmartWinnr supports the import of SCORM courses, enabling you to incorporate external e-learning content into your learning ecosystem.

items.title: How to Mark the attendance for Users  in Learning Sessions?
items.description: If the SmartPath assigned to the trainees has a learning session added to it, the editor/instructor should mark the attendance for the trainees.

items.title: How to Mark the attendance for Users  in Learning Sessions?
items.description: If you are an instructor for the learning session in a SmartPath created in SmartWinnr, you should mark the attendance of the trainees who attended the…

items.title: How to send an Absent Reminder to Participants by the trainer to Improve Attendance
items.description: An Editor who has access to the SmartPaths can send the Absent Reminder to the learners.

items.title: How to take the SmartPath Assigned to me in SmartWinnr?

items.title: How to view the SmartPath Analytics.
items.description: You can view detailed analytics for any SmartPath to understand learner engagement, progress, and performance.

items.title: SmartPath
items.description: Curated learning journeys that combine quizzes, content, coaching, and live sessions.

items.title: What are SmartPaths.
items.description: A SmartPath is a structured learning journey created for each individual in your team.
